Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Governance as Autocatalytic System

As a community designing governance I want systems that produce conditions making more governance possible So that regenerative direction accelerates automatically
Scenario Autocatalytic governance produces more governance
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
GivenOstrom's principles produce trust
Whentrust reduces coordination cost
Thenlower coordination cost enables more cooperation
Andmore cooperation produces more trust
Andthe cycle continues without external intervention
Scenario Holonic structure enables catalysis at multiple scales
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
GivenMicro-Holon cooperation generates mesoscale coordination capacity
Whenmesoscale coordination generates macroscale governance power
Thengovernance power flows back as resources to Micro-Holons
Andeach scale catalyzes the scales above and below simultaneously
Scenario Egregore competition replaces election cycles
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
Giveninfluence flows to what's working
Whenlosing Egregores fade and winning Egregores replicate
Thencontinuous evidence-based competition operates
Andgovernance efficiency improves without fixed election schedules
Scenario Evidence-based competition prevents dominance
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
Givenno single Egregore can dominate the system
Whengovernance efficiency and ecosystem integration are evaluated
Thenrole assignment through Harmonization Engine prevents monopoly
Anddiverse approaches compete on measured performance
Scenario Intrinsically regenerative autocatalysis prevents destructive cycles
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
Givendestructive governance systems operate autocatalytically in the negative direction
Andpolarization enables nationalist-religious coalition and civil war triggers
Whenthe community designs governance with intrinsic regenerative direction
Thenthe autocatalytic mechanism accelerates beneficial outcomes
Andthe same structural pattern that produces failure in extractive systems produces success in regenerative systems
Scenario Governance effectiveness is measured continuously
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
Giveninfluence calculation depends on governance efficiency
Andecosystem integration is tracked over time
Whenan Egregore's approach loses effectiveness
Theninfluence decreases and the approach fades
Andsuccessful approaches gain influence and replicate
Andthe community continuously improves without formal review cycles
Scenario Local commons connect to regional and global coordination
GivenEgregores compete for DAO influence based on governance efficiency
Andthe Egregore Harmonization Engine assigns roles: Catalyst, Stabilizer, Synthesizer, Purifier, Oracle
AndHolonic structure nests Micro-Holons inside Meso-Holons inside Macro-Holons
AndOstrom's 8 principles provide empirical foundation for commons self-governance
GivenMicro-Holons represent local biomes
WhenMeso-Holons provide regional node coordination
AndMacro-Holons enable global coordination
Thenlocal commons decisions align with regional capacity
Andregional capacity aligns with global governance power
Andresources flow bidirectionally across all three scales
